message:
⚡ Use cache layer for kagenti demo data persistence (#884)

Convert all 4 kagenti hooks (useKagentiAgents, useKagentiBuilds,
useKagentiCards, useKagentiTools) from manual useState/useEffect
pattern to useCache({ demoData }) from the unified cache layer.

This fixes demo-mode cards losing data on navigation by persisting
demo data through the shared CacheStore. Also eliminates ~250 lines
of duplicated polling, mode-transition, and error-tracking logic
that useCache handles automatically.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
